title: Alec (disambiguation)
content:
'''Alec''' may refer to:

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Alec (Human)|'''Alec''']], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] fence who received a smuggled shipment of contraband
*[[Alec (Jedi)|'''Alec''']], a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] whose [[Padawan/Legends|padawan]] was seduced by a fallen Jedi
*'''[[Alec Efran]]''', a Coruscant Security Force officer
*'''[[Alec Mard]]''', a member of [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin's]] [[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|Wing Guard]]
*'''[[Alec Lamere]]''', a lord of [[House Barnaba]]
*'''[[Alec Pradeux]]''', an advisor of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]
*'''[[Alec Ranin]]''', a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Journalist/Legends|news reporter]]
*'''[[Aleck W'a Ni Odus]]''', a [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]]
*'''[[Aleco Stusea]]''', a [[Near-Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]
*'''[[Alecs Brellar]]''', a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]

==[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]==
*'''[[Alec Guinness]]''', the actor who portrayed [[Obi-Wan Kenobi]] in the [[original trilogy]]
*'''[[Alec Medlock]]''', a voice actor in ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]''
*'''[[Alec Mills]]''', the main unit camera operator on [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']]
*'''[[Alec Newman]]''', a voice actor in ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''
*'''[[Alec Worley]]''', a [[Star Wars comic books|comic adaptations]] author

{{Disambig}}
